privileged_info_summary: The task requires creating a GeoServer user 'gis_reader' with password 'GisR3ader2024!' and assigning it to role 'ROLE_GIS_READER'. The environment uses GeoServer 2.25.2 with Natural Earth public geospatial data published in the 'ne' workspace. Data access and WMS service rules must be configured to grant the new role read access to the 'ne.*.r' resource pattern and WMS service access. GeoServer admin credentials are admin/Admin123!. All metadata claims are consistent with the task specification and refer to explicitly defined task requirements, not hidden information.
